---
title: "Heatmap_Production"
author: "Alos Diallo"
date: "2025-08-05"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

Main EWAS

Without Combat
```{r}
# ewas_metastasis_h6_normImmune.R     · 2025-07-18
# Single HiTIMED h = 6 → immune-fraction normalisation + EpiScore
# Phenotypes: any_mets · ln_only · distant
# NOTE: ComBat is DISABLED — same-cohort v1/v2; using intersected probes instead.

## ── USER SETTINGS ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
idat_v1  <- "/Users/adiallo/Desktop/Thesis/Data_Documents/All_Data/DNA_Methylation/dm_data/no_match/idats/"
idat_v2  <- "/Users/adiallo/Desktop/Thesis/Data_Documents/All_Data/DNA_Methylation/dm_data/no_match/25_samples/"
meta_csv <- "/Users/adiallo/Desktop/Thesis/Data_Documents/data_all.csv"

phenotypes          <- c(any  = "any_mets",
                         ln   = "ln_only",
                         dist = "distant")
variance_percentile <- 0.90  # 0 ⇒ keep all CpGs

## NEW: centralize outputs/caches here
results_root <- "/Users/adiallo/Desktop/Thesis/Results"

msg <- function(...) cat("[", format(Sys.time(), "%H:%M:%S"), "]", ..., "\n")

suppressPackageStartupMessages({
  library(minfi)
  library(sesame)
  library(ENmix)
  library(matrixStats)
  library(limma)
  # library(sva)   # <- not needed since ComBat is off
  library(HiTIMED)
  library(EpiDISH)
  library(tidyverse)
  library(glue)
})

read_csv_silent <- function(file, ...) {
  if (utils::packageVersion("readr") >= "2.0.0") {
    readr::read_csv(file, show_col_types = FALSE, ...)
  } else {
    suppressMessages(readr::read_csv(file, ...))
  }
}

## ── 1) β-matrix (cached) ────────────────────────────────────────────────────
## cache under Results
cache_dir <- file.path(results_root, "ewas_cache")
dir.create(cache_dir, showWarnings = FALSE, recursive = TRUE)
beta_rds      <- file.path(cache_dir, "beta_comb_qc.rds")
manifest_csv  <- file.path(cache_dir, "sample_manifest_v1_v2.csv")

read_pp <- function(path, tag) {
  rg  <- read.metharray.exp(path, recursive = TRUE, extended = TRUE, force = TRUE)
  bet <- getBeta(preprocessNoob(rg, dyeMethod = "single"))
  if (tag == "v2") bet <- betasCollapseToPfx(bet)
  bad <- ENmix::QCinfo(rg)$badCpG
  bet <- bet[ setdiff(rownames(bet), bad), , drop = FALSE]
  bet
}

## Save sample IDs per platform so we can label Array_Version later
if (!file.exists(beta_rds)) {
  msg("Reading / normalising IDATs …")
  beta1 <- read_pp(idat_v1, "v1")
  beta2 <- read_pp(idat_v2, "v2")

  sample_ids_v1 <- colnames(beta1)
  sample_ids_v2 <- colnames(beta2)

  common <- intersect(rownames(beta1), rownames(beta2))
  stopifnot(length(common) > 0)
  beta_comb <- cbind(beta1[common, , drop = FALSE],
                     beta2[common, , drop = FALSE])

  saveRDS(list(beta = beta_comb,
               sample_ids_v1 = sample_ids_v1,
               sample_ids_v2 = sample_ids_v2),
          beta_rds)

  tibble(
    SampleID = c(sample_ids_v1, sample_ids_v2),
    Array_Version = c(rep("v1", length(sample_ids_v1)),
                      rep("v2", length(sample_ids_v2)))
  ) %>%
    distinct() %>%
    write_csv(manifest_csv)

  msg("β-matrix cached.")
} else {
  cache_obj <- readRDS(beta_rds)
  if (is.list(cache_obj) && !is.null(cache_obj$beta)) {
    beta_comb     <- cache_obj$beta
    sample_ids_v1 <- cache_obj$sample_ids_v1
    sample_ids_v2 <- cache_obj$sample_ids_v2
  } else {
    ## backward compat if the RDS used to be only the matrix
    beta_comb     <- cache_obj
    sample_ids_v1 <- character(0)
    sample_ids_v2 <- character(0)
  }
  msg("β-matrix loaded from cache.")
}

## --- Remove sex-linked probes ----------------------------------------------
get_annotation_for <- function(beta_mat) {
  if (requireNamespace("IlluminaHumanMethylationEPICanno.ilm10b4.hg19", quietly = TRUE)) {
    suppressPackageStartupMessages(library(IlluminaHumanMethylationEPICanno.ilm10b4.hg19))
    a <- getAnnotation(IlluminaHumanMethylationEPICanno.ilm10b4.hg19)
  } else if (requireNamespace("IlluminaHumanMethylation450kanno.ilmn12.hg19", quietly = TRUE)) {
    suppressPackageStartupMessages(library(IlluminaHumanMethylation450kanno.ilmn12.hg19))
    a <- getAnnotation(IlluminaHumanMethylation450kanno.ilmn12.hg19)
  } else {
    stop("Install an Illumina methylation annotation package (EPIC or 450k).")
  }
  a[rownames(a) %in% rownames(beta_mat), , drop = FALSE]
}

anno <- get_annotation_for(beta_comb)

# Try multiple possible chromosome fields across annotation versions
chr_vec <- NULL
if ("chr" %in% colnames(anno))             chr_vec <- anno$chr
if (is.null(chr_vec) && "CHR" %in% colnames(anno))      chr_vec <- anno$CHR
if (is.null(chr_vec) && "seqnames" %in% colnames(anno)) chr_vec <- as.character(anno$seqnames)
if (is.null(chr_vec)) stop("Could not find chromosome column in annotation.")

is_sex_chr <- chr_vec %in% c("chrX","chrY","X","Y")
sex_probes <- rownames(anno)[is_sex_chr]

n_before <- nrow(beta_comb)
if (length(sex_probes) > 0) {
  beta_comb <- beta_comb[setdiff(rownames(beta_comb), sex_probes), , drop = FALSE]
}
msg(length(sex_probes), " chrX/chrY probes removed; ",
    n_before, " → ", nrow(beta_comb), " CpGs remain.")

## ── Variance filter (optional) ──────────────────────────────────────────────
M.mat <- log2(beta_comb / pmax(1 - beta_comb, 1e-6) + 1e-6)
if (variance_percentile > 0) {
  v <- rowVars(M.mat, na.rm = TRUE)
  var_thr <- quantile(v, variance_percentile, na.rm = TRUE)
  keep    <- v > var_thr
  beta_comb <- beta_comb[keep, , drop = FALSE]
  M.mat     <- M.mat[keep, , drop = FALSE]
  msg(sum(keep), " CpGs kept (top ", 100 * (1 - variance_percentile), "% var).")
}

## ── 2a) EpiScore for fibroblasts (RPC) ──────────────────────────────────────
data(centEpiFibIC.m)  # built-in colon-fibroblast reference

run_episcore <- function(beta) {
  common <- intersect(rownames(beta), rownames(centEpiFibIC.m))
  est    <- epidish(beta[common, ],
                    centEpiFibIC.m[common, ],
                    method = "RPC")$estF
  as.data.frame(est) * 100    # columns = Epi, Fib, IC
}

msg("Running EpiScore (RPC) for fibroblast …")
fib_scores <- run_episcore(beta_comb) %>%
  rownames_to_column("SampleID")

## ── 2b) HiTIMED deconvolution (h = 6) ───────────────────────────────────────
msg("Running HiTIMED  h = 6 …")
frac_h6 <- HiTIMED_deconvolution(beta_comb, "COAD", h = 6) %>%
  as.data.frame() %>%
  rownames_to_column("SampleID") %>%
  left_join(fib_scores, by = "SampleID")   # adds Fib from EpiScore

## ── 3) Collapse / normalise fractions ───────────────────────────────────────
collapse_frac <- function(df) {
  get_ <- function(x) if (x %in% names(df)) df[[x]] else 0
  imm_cols <- c("CD8mem","CD8nv","CD4mem","CD4nv","Treg","Bmem","Bnv","DC","Mono","NK")
  totalImm <- rowSums(df[imm_cols], na.rm = TRUE); totalImm[totalImm == 0] <- NA
  tibble(
    SampleID     = df$SampleID,
    Tumor        = get_("Tumor"),
    Fibroblast   = get_("Fib"),               # from EpiScore
    StromalOther = get_("Endothelial") + get_("Epithelial"),
    CD8_T        = (get_("CD8mem") + get_("CD8nv")) / totalImm,
    LymphOther   = (get_("CD4mem") + get_("CD4nv") +
                    get_("Treg")   + get_("Bmem") + get_("Bnv")) / totalImm
  ) %>% mutate(across(where(is.numeric), as.numeric))
}

## ── 4) Tier templates (unchanged design) ────────────────────────────────────
tier_template <- list(
  Tier1 = c("age","sex_num","MLH1_num"),
  Tier2 = c("age","sex_num","MLH1_num","Tumor"),
  Tier3 = c("age","sex_num","MLH1_num","Tumor",
            "Fibroblast","StromalOther",
            "CD8_T","LymphOther")
)
trim_tiers <- function(tiers, avail) lapply(tiers, intersect, avail)

## ── 5) Loop over phenotypes (NO ComBat) ─────────────────────────────────────
for (pheno_tag in names(phenotypes)) {
  pheno_var <- phenotypes[[pheno_tag]]
  msg("\n===== ", pheno_var, " =====")

  meta <- read_csv_silent(meta_csv) %>%
    mutate(
      SampleID      = paste(Sentrix_ID, Sentrix_Position, sep = "_"),
      any_mets      = as.integer(any_mets),
      distant       = as.integer(Distant_Mets),
      ln_only       = as.integer(ln_only),
      sex_num       = as.integer(sex == "M"),
      MLH1_num      = as.integer(MLH1 == 1)
    )

  ## Use saved vectors to tag array version (for reference only)
  meta <- meta %>%
    mutate(
      Array_Version = case_when(
        SampleID %in% sample_ids_v1 ~ "v1",
        SampleID %in% sample_ids_v2 ~ "v2",
        TRUE                        ~ NA_character_
      )
    )

  if (any(is.na(meta$Array_Version))) {
    miss <- meta$SampleID[is.na(meta$Array_Version)]
    msg("WARNING: ", length(miss), " meta SampleIDs not matched to v1/v2: ",
        paste(head(miss, 8), collapse = ", "),
        if (length(miss) > 8) " …" else "")
  }

  meta$pheno_bin <- dplyr::case_when(
    pheno_var == "any_mets" ~ meta$any_mets,
    pheno_var == "distant"  ~ meta$distant,
    pheno_var == "ln_only"  ~ (meta$ln_only & !meta$distant),
    TRUE                    ~ NA_integer_
  )
  stopifnot(all(meta$pheno_bin %in% 0:1, na.rm = TRUE))

  frac_df  <- collapse_frac(frac_h6)
  meta_all <- left_join(meta, frac_df, by = "SampleID")
  ok       <- complete.cases(meta_all[, tier_template$Tier3])
  meta_f   <- meta_all[ok, , drop = FALSE]
  M_f      <- M.mat[, meta_f$SampleID, drop = FALSE]

  ## NO ComBat: same-cohort v1/v2 + intersected probes is sufficient
  M_cb <- M_f

  tier_list <- trim_tiers(tier_template, names(meta_f))
  fits <- purrr::map(tier_list, function(covs) {
    # Only numeric covariates with non-zero variance; use stats::sd explicitly
    is_var <- vapply(
      meta_f[covs],
      function(x) is.numeric(x) && is.finite(stats::sd(x, na.rm = TRUE)) && stats::sd(x, na.rm = TRUE) > 0,
      logical(1)
    )
    nz <- covs[is_var]

    form <- if (length(nz) == 0) {
      ~ pheno_bin
    } else {
      as.formula(paste("~ pheno_bin +", paste(nz, collapse = " + ")))
    }
    des <- model.matrix(form, meta_f)
    eBayes(lmFit(M_cb, des), trend = TRUE, robust = TRUE)
  })

  ## write results under Results root
  out_dir <- file.path(results_root, glue("results_ewas_{pheno_tag}"), "H6")
  dir.create(out_dir, recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)
  saveRDS(fits, file.path(out_dir, "ewas_fits.rds"))
  msg("✓  fits saved → ", out_dir)
}

msg("\n✅ Finished: Any, LN-only, Distant  (HiTIMED-h6, immune-normalised + EpiScore; NO ComBat)")
```


Gene list:
```{r}
###############################################################################
# summarize_top_cpgs.R
# - For each phenotype (any, ln, dist):
#   - Identify top hyper/hypo CpGs from that phenotype's EWAS (Tier3).
#   - Create SEPARATE summary tables for hyper and hypo CpGs.
# - Matches the EWAS output layout from your current pipeline.
###############################################################################

## --------------- USER SETTINGS ------------------------------------------- ##
results_root <- "/Users/adiallo/Desktop/Thesis/Results"

h_level <- "H6"      # <- current pipeline saves under H6
tier    <- "Tier3"   # use the Tier3 fit

top_n   <- 100       # number of hyper and hypo CpGs to output per phenotype

# Where to save the final summary tables
output_dir <- file.path(results_root, "results_summary")
dir.create(output_dir, showWarnings = FALSE, recursive = TRUE)

## --------------- SETUP ---------------------------------------------------- ##
suppressPackageStartupMessages({
  library(limma); library(dplyr); library(glue)
  library(readr); library(tibble)
})

msg <- function(...) cat("[", format(Sys.time(), "%H:%M:%S"), "]", ..., "\n")

## Optional: EPIC annotation (for Gene column)
get_epic_annotation <- function() {
  if (requireNamespace("IlluminaHumanMethylationEPICanno.ilm10b4.hg19", quietly = TRUE)) {
    suppressPackageStartupMessages(
      library(IlluminaHumanMethylationEPICanno.ilm10b4.hg19)
    )
    getAnnotation(IlluminaHumanMethylationEPICanno.ilm10b4.hg19)
  } else {
    warning("EPIC annotation package not available; 'Gene' column will be NA.")
    NULL
  }
}

###############################################################################
##  1. LOAD ALL EWAS RESULTS
###############################################################################
msg("Loading all EWAS results...")

phenotypes <- c("any", "ln", "dist")
all_results <- list()

for (ph_tag in phenotypes) {
  fit_file <- file.path(results_root, glue("results_ewas_{ph_tag}"), h_level, "ewas_fits.rds")
  if (!file.exists(fit_file)) {
    warning(glue("Could not find fits file for phenotype '{ph_tag}' at: {fit_file}. Skipping."))
    next
  }

  fits <- readRDS(fit_file)

  if (!tier %in% names(fits)) {
    warning(glue("Tier '{tier}' not found for phenotype '{ph_tag}'. Skipping."))
    next
  }

  fit_obj <- fits[[tier]]
  if (!inherits(fit_obj, "MArrayLM")) {
    # some pipelines store as list with $fit
    fit_obj <- fit_obj$fit
  }

  # Extract a full table, explicitly by the phenotype coefficient
  tt <- topTable(fit_obj, coef = "pheno_bin", number = Inf, p.value = 1, adjust.method = "BH") %>%
    tibble::rownames_to_column("CpG_ID")

  all_results[[ph_tag]] <- tt
}

if (length(all_results) == 0) {
  stop("No EWAS results found. Check 'results_root', 'h_level', and that fits were saved.")
}

###############################################################################
##  2. LOAD/BUILD ANNOTATION MAP (optional Gene column)
###############################################################################
anno <- get_epic_annotation()
probe2gene <- NULL
if (!is.null(anno)) {
  # EPIC annotation: Name = probe ID (cg...), UCSC_RefGene_Name = semicolon-separated genes
  gn <- as.character(anno$UCSC_RefGene_Name)
  gn <- sub(";.*$", "", gn)  # first listed gene
  names(gn) <- as.character(anno$Name)
  probe2gene <- gn
}

###############################################################################
##  3. MAIN LOOP TO GENERATE TABLES FOR EACH PHENOTYPE
###############################################################################
for (primary_phenotype in phenotypes) {

  if (!primary_phenotype %in% names(all_results)) next  # Skip if missing

  msg(glue::glue("--- Generating summary tables for top hits from '{primary_phenotype}' ---"))

  primary_results <- all_results[[primary_phenotype]]

  # Ensure needed columns exist
  need_cols <- c("CpG_ID", "logFC", "P.Value", "adj.P.Val")
  if (!all(need_cols %in% names(primary_results))) {
    warning(glue::glue(
      "Primary results for '{primary_phenotype}' missing required cols: ",
      "{paste(setdiff(need_cols, names(primary_results)), collapse=', ')}. Skipping."
    ))
    next
  }

  # --- HYPER: logFC > 0, ordered by P (smallest first), take top_n
  top_hyper_ids <- primary_results %>%
    dplyr::filter(is.finite(P.Value), logFC > 0) %>%
    dplyr::arrange(P.Value) %>%
    dplyr::slice_head(n = top_n) %>%
    dplyr::pull(CpG_ID)

  summary_table_hyper <- primary_results %>%
    dplyr::filter(CpG_ID %in% top_hyper_ids) %>%
    dplyr::arrange(P.Value) %>%
    dplyr::select(CpG_ID, logFC, P.Value, adj.P.Val) %>%
    dplyr::rename_with(~ glue::glue("{.}_{primary_phenotype}"), .cols = -CpG_ID)

  # --- HYPO: logFC < 0, ordered by P (smallest first), take top_n
  top_hypo_ids <- primary_results %>%
    dplyr::filter(is.finite(P.Value), logFC < 0) %>%
    dplyr::arrange(P.Value) %>%
    dplyr::slice_head(n = top_n) %>%
    dplyr::pull(CpG_ID)

  summary_table_hypo <- primary_results %>%
    dplyr::filter(CpG_ID %in% top_hypo_ids) %>%
    dplyr::arrange(P.Value) %>%
    dplyr::select(CpG_ID, logFC, P.Value, adj.P.Val) %>%
    dplyr::rename_with(~ glue::glue("{.}_{primary_phenotype}"), .cols = -CpG_ID)

  # Add P-values from the other phenotypes
  other_phenotypes <- setdiff(phenotypes, primary_phenotype)
  for (ph_tag in other_phenotypes) {
    if (!ph_tag %in% names(all_results)) next
    pvals <- all_results[[ph_tag]] %>%
      dplyr::select(CpG_ID, P.Value) %>%
      dplyr::rename(!!glue::glue("P.Value_{ph_tag}") := P.Value)

    summary_table_hyper <- dplyr::left_join(summary_table_hyper, pvals, by = "CpG_ID")
    summary_table_hypo  <- dplyr::left_join(summary_table_hypo,  pvals, by = "CpG_ID")
  }

  # Add Gene column (if annotation available)
  if (!is.null(probe2gene)) {
    summary_table_hyper <- summary_table_hyper %>%
      dplyr::mutate(Gene = unname(probe2gene[CpG_ID]), .after = CpG_ID)
    summary_table_hypo <- summary_table_hypo %>%
      dplyr::mutate(Gene = unname(probe2gene[CpG_ID]), .after = CpG_ID)
  } else {
    summary_table_hyper <- summary_table_hyper %>%
      dplyr::mutate(Gene = NA_character_, .after = CpG_ID)
    summary_table_hypo <- summary_table_hypo %>%
      dplyr::mutate(Gene = NA_character_, .after = CpG_ID)
  }

  # Write out
  out_hyper <- file.path(output_dir, glue::glue("Top{top_n}_DMPs_Summary_from_{primary_phenotype}_hyper.csv"))
  out_hypo  <- file.path(output_dir, glue::glue("Top{top_n}_DMPs_Summary_from_{primary_phenotype}_hypo.csv"))

  readr::write_csv(summary_table_hyper, out_hyper)
  readr::write_csv(summary_table_hypo,  out_hypo)

  msg(glue::glue("✓ Saved: {basename(out_hyper)}"))
  msg(glue::glue("✓ Saved: {basename(out_hypo)}"))
}

msg("\n✅  All summary tables created successfully.")
```

Expanded gene list information
```{r}
###############################################################################
# summarize_top_cpgs.R
# - For each phenotype (any, ln, dist):
#   - Creates summary tables for the Top 100 hyper/hypo CpGs.
#   - NEW: Creates a comprehensive table with ALL CpGs from the EWAS,
#     including gene annotations and beta values for every sample.
###############################################################################

## --------------- USER SETTINGS ------------------------------------------- ##
results_root <- "/Users/adiallo/Desktop/Thesis/Results"
meta_csv_path <- "/Users/adiallo/Desktop/Thesis/Data_Documents/data_all.csv" # Path to metadata

h_level <- "H6"
tier    <- "Tier3"
top_n   <- 100

output_dir <- file.path(results_root, "results_summary")
dir.create(output_dir, showWarnings = FALSE, recursive = TRUE)

## --------------- SETUP ---------------------------------------------------- ##
suppressPackageStartupMessages({
  library(limma); library(dplyr); library(glue)
  library(readr); library(tibble)
})

msg <- function(...) cat("[", format(Sys.time(), "%H:%M:%S"), "]", ..., "\n")

get_epic_annotation <- function() {
  if (requireNamespace("IlluminaHumanMethylationEPICanno.ilm10b4.hg19", quietly = TRUE)) {
    suppressPackageStartupMessages(library(IlluminaHumanMethylationEPICanno.ilm10b4.hg19))
    getAnnotation(IlluminaHumanMethylationEPICanno.ilm10b4.hg19)
  } else {
    warning("EPIC annotation package not available; 'Gene' column will be NA.")
    NULL
  }
}

###############################################################################
##  NEW: 1. LOAD BETA MATRIX AND METADATA
###############################################################################
msg("Loading main beta matrix and metadata...")

beta_rds <- file.path(results_root, "ewas_cache", "beta_comb_qc.rds")
if (!file.exists(beta_rds)) {
  stop("Beta matrix cache file not found at: ", beta_rds)
}
# Assuming the RDS contains a list with a 'beta' element
beta_comb <- readRDS(beta_rds)$beta

meta <- read_csv(meta_csv_path, show_col_types = FALSE) %>%
  mutate(
    SampleID = paste(Sentrix_ID, Sentrix_Position, sep = "_"),
    Group = factor(if_else(any_mets == 1, "Metastasis", "No Metastasis"),
                   levels = c("No Metastasis", "Metastasis"))
  ) %>%
  # Filter to samples present in the beta matrix and arrange them
  filter(SampleID %in% colnames(beta_comb)) %>%
  arrange(Group)

# Order the beta matrix columns to match the ordered metadata
beta_comb_ordered <- beta_comb[, meta$SampleID]


###############################################################################
##  2. LOAD ALL EWAS RESULTS
###############################################################################
msg("Loading all EWAS results...")

phenotypes <- c("any", "ln", "dist")
all_results <- list()

for (ph_tag in phenotypes) {
  fit_file <- file.path(results_root, glue("results_ewas_{ph_tag}"), h_level, "ewas_fits.rds")
  if (!file.exists(fit_file)) {
    warning(glue("Could not find fits file for phenotype '{ph_tag}'. Skipping."))
    next
  }
  fits <- readRDS(fit_file)
  if (!tier %in% names(fits)) {
    warning(glue("Tier '{tier}' not found for phenotype '{ph_tag}'. Skipping."))
    next
  }
  fit_obj <- fits[[tier]]; if (!inherits(fit_obj, "MArrayLM")) fit_obj <- fit_obj$fit
  tt <- topTable(fit_obj, coef = "pheno_bin", number = Inf, p.value = 1, adjust.method = "BH") %>%
    tibble::rownames_to_column("CpG_ID")
  all_results[[ph_tag]] <- tt
}
if (length(all_results) == 0) {
  stop("No EWAS results found.")
}

###############################################################################
##  3. LOAD/BUILD ANNOTATION MAP
###############################################################################
anno <- get_epic_annotation()
probe2gene <- NULL
if (!is.null(anno)) {
  gn <- as.character(anno$UCSC_RefGene_Name)
  gn <- sub(";.*$", "", gn)
  names(gn) <- as.character(anno$Name)
  probe2gene <- gn
}

###############################################################################
##  4. MAIN LOOP TO GENERATE TABLES FOR EACH PHENOTYPE
###############################################################################
for (primary_phenotype in phenotypes) {

  if (!primary_phenotype %in% names(all_results)) next
  
  msg(glue::glue("--- Generating tables for '{primary_phenotype}' ---"))
  primary_results <- all_results[[primary_phenotype]]

  # --- A. Generate and save the full data file with beta values ---
  
  # Get CpGs that are in both the EWAS results and the main beta matrix
  common_cpgs <- intersect(primary_results$CpG_ID, rownames(beta_comb_ordered))
  
  # Prepare the parts: stats, genes, and beta values
  stats_part <- primary_results %>% dplyr::filter(CpG_ID %in% common_cpgs)
  gene_part  <- tibble(CpG_ID = common_cpgs, Gene = unname(probe2gene[common_cpgs]))
  beta_part  <- as.data.frame(beta_comb_ordered[common_cpgs, ]) %>% rownames_to_column("CpG_ID")
  
  # Join everything together
  full_data_table <- stats_part %>%
    left_join(gene_part, by = "CpG_ID") %>%
    left_join(beta_part, by = "CpG_ID") %>%
    # Reorder columns for clarity
    dplyr::select(CpG_ID, Gene, logFC, P.Value, adj.P.Val, everything())
    
  # Write out the full table
  out_full <- file.path(output_dir, glue::glue("Full_EWAS_Results_with_Betas_{primary_phenotype}.csv"))
  readr::write_csv(full_data_table, out_full)
  msg(glue::glue("✓ Saved full data: {basename(out_full)}"))

  # --- B. Generate and save the Top N summary tables (original functionality) ---
  
  top_hyper_ids <- primary_results %>%
    filter(is.finite(P.Value), logFC > 0) %>% arrange(P.Value) %>% slice_head(n = top_n) %>% pull(CpG_ID)
  summary_table_hyper <- primary_results %>%
    filter(CpG_ID %in% top_hyper_ids) %>% arrange(P.Value) %>% dplyr::select(CpG_ID, logFC, P.Value, adj.P.Val) %>%
    rename_with(~ glue("{.}_{primary_phenotype}"), .cols = -CpG_ID)

  top_hypo_ids <- primary_results %>%
    filter(is.finite(P.Value), logFC < 0) %>% arrange(P.Value) %>% slice_head(n = top_n) %>% pull(CpG_ID)
  summary_table_hypo <- primary_results %>%
    filter(CpG_ID %in% top_hypo_ids) %>% arrange(P.Value) %>% dplyr::select(CpG_ID, logFC, P.Value, adj.P.Val) %>%
    rename_with(~ glue("{.}_{primary_phenotype}"), .cols = -CpG_ID)

  # Add Gene column
  if (!is.null(probe2gene)) {
    summary_table_hyper <- summary_table_hyper %>% mutate(Gene = unname(probe2gene[CpG_ID]), .after = CpG_ID)
    summary_table_hypo  <- summary_table_hypo  %>% mutate(Gene = unname(probe2gene[CpG_ID]), .after = CpG_ID)
  }
  
  # Write out Top N tables
  out_hyper <- file.path(output_dir, glue("Top{top_n}_DMPs_Summary_from_{primary_phenotype}_hyper.csv"))
  out_hypo  <- file.path(output_dir, glue("Top{top_n}_DMPs_Summary_from_{primary_phenotype}_hypo.csv"))
  readr::write_csv(summary_table_hyper, out_hyper)
  readr::write_csv(summary_table_hypo,  out_hypo)
  msg(glue("✓ Saved Top {top_n} summary: {basename(out_hyper)}"))
  msg(glue("✓ Saved Top {top_n} summary: {basename(out_hypo)}"))
}

msg("\n✅ All summary tables created successfully.")
```


Heatmap:
```{r}
################################################################################
# SCRIPT: heatmap_separate_conditions_full_dist_dual_annot_cairo_legend.R
# PURPOSE:
#   Generate separate heatmaps (Cairo PDF) for 'Any', 'LN' (Top 10 H/H),
#   and 'Distant' (FULL provided list), with dual row annotations.
#   Generates separate legends. Columns ordered, color adjusted.
#   Relies on in-memory variables beta_comb, meta_csv.
#
# INPUTS (Assumed in Environment):
#   - beta_comb, meta_csv
#
# OUTPUTS:
#   - Heatmap PDF per condition using Cairo.
#   - Separate legend PDF per condition using Cairo.
################################################################################

suppressPackageStartupMessages({
  library(dplyr); library(glue); library(readr); library(tibble)
  library(pheatmap); library(RColorBrewer)
  library(Cairo)
  library(grid)
  library(gridExtra)
})

# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
# 1. Define paths and parameters
# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
stopifnot(exists("beta_comb"))
stopifnot(exists("meta_csv"))
results_root <- "/Users/adiallo/Desktop/Thesis/Results"
output_dir <- file.path(results_root, "results_publication_figure", "SeparateHeatmapsCombinedDualAnnotCairo")
dir.create(output_dir, showWarnings = FALSE, recursive = TRUE)
msg <- function(...) cat("[", format(Sys.time(), "%H:%M:%S"), "]", ..., "\n")
top_n_default <- 10 # For 'any' and 'ln' conditions
top_n_dist    <- 30 # Defined but NOT used if take_all_dist = TRUE below

# --- NEW FLAG ---
take_all_dist <- FALSE # Set to TRUE to use the full list for 'dist', FALSE to use top_n_dist

cell_size_points <- 10 # Adjust as needed (e.g., 8, 10, 12)
points_per_inch <- 72.27 # Conversion factor

# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
# 2. Load Curated CpG Lists for Each Condition 🧬 (UPDATED SECTION)
# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
msg("Loading and processing CpG lists for each condition...")

# --- Any Mets List ---
cpg_text_any <- "
CpG_ID	Gene	logFC	P.Value
cg19020602	CAPN13	-1.200366501	1.09E-05
cg26750188	JMJD8	1.714528763	5.43E-05
cg12691739	CA10	-1.121074564	7.01E-05
cg09304803	NA	1.269175213	7.92E-05
cg23355745	LINC00424	-1.152236275	9.55E-05
cg14501323	GALNT14	-1.0453368	1.30E-04
cg04888241	ADRA2C	1.478186281	2.05E-04
cg27498387	ANK1	-1.110161429	2.21E-04
cg16756764	NA	-0.884691544	2.53E-04
cg06224587	NA	1.053002187	2.93E-04
cg04165214	NA	-0.975354308	3.24E-04
cg11895993	FER1L6-AS2	-0.948939953	3.25E-04
cg06631010	SLIT2	1.494708577	3.38E-04
cg14362370	ABL1	0.810419006	3.61E-04
cg26996201	PAK1	-1.574466995	4.40E-04
cg24529549	C10orf11	-0.955556119	4.47E-04
cg10573232	CCDC60	1.42612803	4.88E-04
cg16474170	PTPRM	1.354714465	4.98E-04
cg24396358	HLA-DOA	-1.006500543	5.21E-04
cg21056723	LOC644145	-1.180958339	5.45E-04
cg26166804	H2AFY2	1.359900986	5.60E-04
cg19221542	NA	-0.885176304	6.21E-04
cg18886245	TFAP2B	-1.151655922	6.86E-04
cg24480555	C8orf33	0.884423034	7.85E-04
cg20964064	KCNQ2	1.064951019	7.99E-04
cg13831596	ATP7B	0.814126873	8.23E-04
cg11287055	DSCR3	-1.724188503	9.13E-04
cg07702509	SNORA39	1.053422132	9.17E-04
cg10213101	NA	-0.88937643	9.21E-04
cg10655471	SPTBN4	1.169433459	9.94E-04
"

# --- LN Mets List ---
cpg_text_ln <- "
CpG_ID	Gene	logFC	P.Value
cg15620908	NA	-1.443271734	2.91E-05
cg22595230	CENPB	1.321039726	1.48E-04
cg22444562	GPR1-AS	-2.912203291	1.65E-04
cg20880234	ZMYM2	-1.515376137	4.30E-04
cg24265806	FAM126A	-1.259162802	6.20E-04
cg25751787	NA	-1.04823444	6.24E-04
cg02959678	ABCA7	1.371366118	7.95E-04
cg25840237	NA	-1.109323624	8.03E-04
cg18823007	NA	-1.097278052	8.23E-04
cg15584445	LOC100190940	1.496749493	8.35E-04
cg02858402	GOLT1A	1.301995258	8.68E-04
cg26871905	NA	-0.930276006	9.85E-04
"

# --- Distant Mets List (FULL LIST PROVIDED BY USER) ---
cpg_text_dist <- "
CpG_ID	Gene	logFC	P.Value
cg09390241	NA	1.627391501	5.84E-06
cg07420190	MARK1	2.135372057	1.38E-05
cg04941073	MARK1	2.289441743	2.47E-05
cg07150925	BSN	1.808177597	2.85E-05
cg08151750	FNDC4	2.073036454	4.70E-05
cg13137176	FAM150B	2.108953586	4.99E-05
cg23721712	HLA-L	1.747301452	5.08E-05
cg03998871	ELOVL5	2.225928865	5.17E-05
cg12109566	HLA-L	1.512658997	6.14E-05
cg10791959	EPHB1	-0.908820117	6.84E-05
cg04258219	NA	1.388834407	7.37E-05
cg20347477	FAM69B	1.392887395	9.48E-05
cg07078114	FAM69B	1.484721887	9.73E-05
cg05847960	NA	1.385343651	1.14E-04
cg13389209	COL5A1	1.035261847	1.20E-04
cg02259934	NA	1.398877096	1.31E-04
cg18326657	HLA-L	1.555388007	1.37E-04
cg26266427	TNXB	1.04393385	1.50E-04
cg19858576	LRRC14B	1.500861828	1.50E-04
cg26844603	TMEM87B	1.074364566	1.56E-04
cg18532273	RASA3	1.082023474	1.58E-04
cg06220235	SOCS1	1.780982063	1.62E-04
cg19608455	MAPK4	1.269291348	1.64E-04
cg04293085	ADRA1D	1.487431999	1.64E-04
cg26275046	NA	1.224557656	1.69E-04
cg04199943	HLA-L	1.562334937	1.70E-04
cg07385694	GALNT9	1.161474307	1.77E-04
cg00382463	NA	1.559739989	1.81E-04
cg16468914	SLC38A3	1.755529863	1.82E-04
cg10030636	NAT8L	1.230634339	1.83E-04
cg03690227	PVALB	1.151444226	1.83E-04
cg07454491	C12orf68	-1.179433688	1.89E-04
cg05059566	PRDM8	1.237500979	1.90E-04
cg11362988	NA	1.490825422	1.91E-04
cg16250461	HLA-L	1.540907732	1.99E-04
cg03906820	GPR123	1.15563835	2.00E-04
cg04501878	ZDHHC22	1.406143745	2.09E-04
cg23598080	LHX4	1.237780079	2.13E-04
cg14852134	NA	1.352660983	2.13E-04
cg23071120	NA	1.432672702	2.14E-04
cg03431655	C3orf50	1.693843144	2.15E-04
cg03775163	NA	1.297650824	2.17E-04
cg08541518	BAI3	1.187971977	2.29E-04
cg21697172	C14orf39	-1.186657913	2.36E-04
cg07965995	NXN	1.066696454	2.37E-04
cg17754876	SLC1A2	1.152235918	2.41E-04
cg16797300	NA	1.551818529	2.41E-04
cg18492647	RASGRP2	1.266189811	2.52E-04
cg26536189	NA	1.488847466	2.53E-04
cg20795569	TCHH	1.580796058	2.63E-04
cg23970275	KLF7	-0.901197129	2.71E-04
cg02177391	CORO2B	1.558487202	2.71E-04
cg15816817	LINC01152	1.6871653	2.77E-04
cg27019257	CSMD2	1.273328484	2.79E-04
cg13411823	NA	1.395205481	2.80E-04
cg23637124	SHC4	1.487980296	2.94E-04
cg25237646	NRN1	1.525389782	2.96E-04
cg19439331	TET1	1.382326247	3.06E-04
cg06285925	ABR	1.955993947	3.13E-04
cg14156405	RGS7	1.4088769	3.34E-04

cg12181133	BNC2	1.379982166	3.72E-04
cg13684305	C1orf65	0.919588965	3.75E-04
cg05421688	FAM163A	1.308767894	3.78E-04
cg01625368	LMO2	1.399355582	3.78E-04
cg04664167	ZNF382	-0.891363671	3.83E-04
cg02112154	NA	1.096615939	4.02E-04
cg01177906	SLC1A2	1.578031363	4.08E-04
cg14060111	ISM1	1.605822225	4.13E-04
cg11460359	MIXL1	1.376162015	4.23E-04

cg02610058	KIF1A	1.778662356	4.40E-04
cg09482986	GABRB2	1.273973958	4.44E-04
cg11939071	DTX1	-1.035310984	4.45E-04
cg06822120	NAT8L	1.385773586	4.50E-04
cg26383307	NRN1	1.373043004	4.55E-04
cg08499094	FNDC4	1.480293163	4.56E-04
cg26269170	NA	1.161657771	4.61E-04
cg23325963	NA	-0.689379889	4.68E-04
cg09426197	CHST1	1.530053651	4.70E-04
cg07864323	ECE2	1.520083413	4.72E-04
cg12825070	HTR4	1.089668506	4.83E-04
cg26203879	GRK5	-1.097634712	4.98E-04
cg08658621	DPYSL4	1.299917862	5.10E-04
cg00398130	STMN2	1.358291305	5.14E-04
cg20925841	INHBB	1.439215783	5.23E-04
cg21271198	ELOVL5	1.37796651	5.25E-04
cg04063589	NEUROG1	0.926321537	5.33E-04
cg05160678	S1PR1	1.243478617	5.34E-04
cg23164681	HLA-L	1.621138816	5.34E-04
cg08249424	CDYL	1.266823716	5.38E-04
cg05518567	GABRB2	1.140092971	5.38E-04
cg04747322	SNCAIP	1.179482837	5.43E-04
cg14865129	NA	1.154986573	5.53E-04
cg06720879	SLC30A3	1.441026735	5.53E-04
cg17456266	LOC387763	1.588906523	5.60E-04
cg06224587	NA	1.081249438	5.64E-04
cg04744597	GABRB2	1.217804382	5.66E-04
cg21273275	GRHL3	1.235025408	5.72E-04
cg25638859	SLC30A10	1.377393771	5.80E-04
cg15570323	C3orf55	1.317311881	5.80E-04
cg09873283	MLN	0.941372077	5.82E-04
cg11446774	MCC	1.244918045	5.85E-04
cg14382750	TMOD1	1.460175432	5.87E-04
cg07725318	HLA-L	1.600110139	6.10E-04
cg17740417	NRN1	1.627101365	6.16E-04
cg16504335	NA	1.286821314	6.28E-04
cg12664209	ISM1	1.591522053	6.32E-04
cg16405012	NTF3	1.404353222	6.43E-04
cg06623560	NA	1.223761803	6.52E-04
cg27196808	WNT1	1.508751047	6.54E-04
cg09987562	TACR1	1.305709409	6.62E-04
cg15757271	WNT5A	1.243347309	6.71E-04
cg17074542	AP3B2	1.291930188	6.73E-04
cg14443362	NA	1.524420157	6.79E-04
cg11070056	PRMT6	1.693998142	6.95E-04
cg18278444	TFPT	1.046457574	6.98E-04
cg26801631	FGR	1.315842075	7.07E-04
cg02135916	OTX2-AS1	-1.115485713	7.15E-04
cg14556303	4-Mar	1.422346757	7.33E-04
cg26695758	TNXB	0.911442881	7.44E-04
cg08770506	NA	1.488110173	7.45E-04
cg12355180	SLC30A10	1.220983865	7.47E-04
cg00144186	FJX1	1.537690506	7.71E-04
cg15040157	MIR548H4	1.103490087	7.73E-04
cg15140191	BEND6	1.251726584	7.76E-04
cg02565529	NA	1.464277936	7.77E-04
cg00417714	ZNF775	1.142891527	7.80E-04
cg17238412	NA	1.388941446	7.84E-04
cg24838641	STXBP5L	1.171535475	7.95E-04
cg14270348	NAV2	1.618545657	7.97E-04
cg01939681	GABRB2	1.230577896	8.04E-04
cg10322724	NA	1.396518693	8.08E-04
cg21745737	PVALB	1.365883935	8.11E-04
cg16428251	SOX14	1.421216317	8.16E-04
cg14029489	PRPH	1.601531373	8.16E-04
cg18863156	LHX4	1.046764155	8.19E-04
cg11438011	HTR4	1.398170316	8.21E-04
cg06056563	LMF1	-0.954847742	8.22E-04
cg02654358	NA	1.13858875	8.23E-04
cg27360003	NEURL	1.637114099	8.34E-04
cg14378848	ELOVL5	1.341269447	8.35E-04
cg16916433	ADAMTS19-AS1	1.461891902	8.40E-04
cg04439159	INHBB	1.407829692	8.41E-04
cg09786098	KREMEN2	1.24681705	8.42E-04
cg06973595	NA	1.428567931	8.46E-04
cg12377578	GRIN2C	1.199490062	8.55E-04
cg10993336	CR2	1.42501741	8.60E-04
cg01380906	4-Mar	1.104103958	8.60E-04
cg27487046	SAMD11	1.275775312	8.78E-04
cg10156366	NA	1.134481123	8.86E-04
cg05871997	BEND6	1.133069017	8.91E-04
cg24925400	PITX2	-0.8704697	8.95E-04
cg19674138	MACROD1	1.480023578	9.06E-04
cg17296441	STMN3	1.441743984	9.15E-04
cg08134053	MFSD2B	1.384003225	9.24E-04
cg24680924	EPHB6	1.379996736	9.33E-04
cg13080716	NA	1.197820248	9.35E-04
cg18800087	CNIH2	1.115503564	9.41E-04
cg19395578	TRPM1	0.944607236	9.46E-04
cg17014009	CACNB4	1.381547509	9.46E-04
cg00185653	NA	0.854325754	9.60E-04
cg16086130	ALDH1A3	1.247829575	9.60E-04
cg25292468	NRP2	1.329766163	9.62E-04
cg12964144	WSCD1	1.317708389	9.70E-04
cg23306526	SIX3	-0.939968904	9.71E-04
cg00682826	SESN1	1.073525758	9.73E-04
cg03669590	CCDC42B	1.329916608	9.79E-04
cg13129651	NA	1.560015442	9.84E-04
cg16659026	PRPF31	1.203113955	9.85E-04
cg04149172	UQCC	1.082421868	9.98E-04
"

# --- MODIFIED: Helper function now takes 'take_all' flag ---
process_cpg_list <- function(text_data, n_top = NULL, take_all = FALSE) {
  clean_text_data <- trimws(text_data, which = "both")
  df <- readr::read_tsv(I(clean_text_data), show_col_types = FALSE, na = "NA") %>%
    dplyr::filter(CpG_ID != "CpG_ID") %>%
    mutate(Gene = if_else(Gene == "4-Mar", "MARCH4", Gene)) %>%
    dplyr::mutate(
      P.Value = as.numeric(P.Value),
      logFC = as.numeric(logFC)
    ) %>%
    dplyr::group_by(CpG_ID) %>%
    dplyr::slice_min(order_by = P.Value, n = 1, with_ties = FALSE) %>%
    dplyr::ungroup() %>%
    # Add Direction here before potentially filtering
    mutate(Direction = if_else(logFC > 0, "Hyper", "Hypo"))

  if (take_all) {
    # If take_all is TRUE, return the whole processed dataframe
    return(df)
  } else {
    # Otherwise, perform the top N selection
    if (is.null(n_top)) stop("n_top must be provided if take_all is FALSE")
    top_hyper <- df %>% filter(Direction == "Hyper") %>% arrange(P.Value) %>% slice_head(n = n_top)
    top_hypo  <- df %>% filter(Direction == "Hypo")  %>% arrange(P.Value) %>% slice_head(n = n_top)
    return(bind_rows(top_hyper, top_hypo))
  }
}

# --- MODIFIED: Call process_cpg_list with take_all = TRUE for 'dist' ---
msg("Processing CpG lists...")
cpg_list_any  <- process_cpg_list(cpg_text_any,  n_top = top_n_default, take_all = FALSE)
cpg_list_ln   <- process_cpg_list(cpg_text_ln,   n_top = top_n_default, take_all = FALSE)
cpg_list_dist <- process_cpg_list(cpg_text_dist, n_top = top_n_dist, take_all = take_all_dist)# n_top is ignored here

cpg_lists <- list(
  any = cpg_list_any,
  ln = cpg_list_ln,
  dist = cpg_list_dist
)

msg("Processed CpG lists:")
for(name in names(cpg_lists)) {
    msg(glue(" -> {name}: {nrow(cpg_lists[[name]])} CpGs ({sum(cpg_lists[[name]]$Direction=='Hyper')} Hyper, {sum(cpg_lists[[name]]$Direction=='Hypo')} Hypo)"))
}


# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
# 3. Define BOTH Functional Role Maps (FULL DEFINITIONS)
# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
# --- Map 1: Pro/Anti-tumor Status ---
role_map_pro_anti <- tribble(
  ~Gene,         ~ProAntiRole,
  "SLIT2",       "Anti-tumor",
  "PTPRM",       "Anti-tumor",
  "SOCS1",       "Anti-tumor",
  "TNXB",        "Anti-tumor",
  "RASA3",       "Anti-tumor",
  "TET1",        "Anti-tumor",
  "MCC",         "Anti-tumor",
  "EPHB1",       "Anti-tumor",
  "SOX14",       "Leaning Anti-tumor",
  "PVALB",       "Leaning Anti-tumor",
  "ZNF382",      "Leaning Anti-tumor",
  "SIX3",        "Leaning Anti-tumor",
  "PITX2",       "Leaning Anti-tumor",
  "PAK1",        "Pro-tumor",
  "ELOVL5",      "Pro-tumor",
  "INHBB",       "Pro-tumor",
  "NRN1",        "Pro-tumor",
  "STMN2",       "Pro-tumor",
  "S1PR1",       "Pro-tumor",
  "WNT1",        "Pro-tumor",
  "PRMT6",       "Pro-tumor",
  "FGR",         "Pro-tumor",
  "JMJD8",       "Pro-tumor",
  "FAM126A",     "Pro-tumor",
  "GPR1-AS",     "Pro-tumor",
  "ANK1",        "Context-Dependent",
  "WNT5A",       "Context-Dependent",
  "KLF7",        "Context-Dependent",
  "DTX1",        "Context-Dependent",
  "GRK5",        "Context-Dependent",
  "ZMYM2",       "Context-Dependent",
  "ABCA7",       "Leaning Anti-tumor",
  "CENPB",       "Leaning Anti-tumor",
  "FNDC4",       "Leaning Anti-tumor",
  "HLA-L",       "Pro-tumor",
  "HLA-DOA",     "Context-Dependent",
  "ALDH1A3",     "Pro-tumor",
  "NRP2",        "Pro-tumor",
  "COL5A1",      "Pro-tumor",
  "GRHL3",       "Anti-tumor",
  "SESN1",       "Anti-tumor",
  "KREMEN2",     "Anti-tumor",
  "EPHB6",       "Anti-tumor",
  "MARK1",       "Context-Dependent",
  "MAPK4",       "Context-Dependent",
  "ABL1",        "Context-Dependent",
  "KIF1A",       "Context-Dependent",
  "ABR",         "Anti-tumor",
  "ADRA2C",      "Pro-tumor",
  "ISM1",        "Context-Dependent",
  "MARCH4",      "Context-Dependent",
  "ADRA1D",      "Pro-tumor",
  "ADAMTS19-AS1","Anti-tumor",
  "BAI3",        "Leaning Anti-tumor",
  "BNC2",        "Leaning Anti-tumor",
  "CORO2B",      "Leaning Pro-tumor",
  "CSMD2",       "Leaning Anti-tumor",
  "FJX1",        "Context-Dependent",
  "H2AFY2",      "Leaning Anti-tumor",
  "LHX4",        "Leaning Pro-tumor",
  "LMO2",        "Leaning Pro-tumor",
  "MACROD1",     "Context-Dependent",
  "MIXL1",       "Leaning Pro-tumor",
  "NAV2",        "Context-Dependent",
  "NEURL",       "Context-Dependent",
  "NEUROG1",     "Leaning Anti-tumor",
  "NTF3",        "Leaning Pro-tumor",
  "NXN",         "Leaning Anti-tumor",
  "RASGRP2",     "Leaning Pro-tumor",
  "SHC4",        "Leaning Pro-tumor",
  "STMN3",       "Leaning Pro-tumor",
  "TACR1",       "Leaning Pro-tumor",
  "TFAP2B",      "Context-Dependent",
  "TRPM1",       "Leaning Anti-tumor",
  "ZDBF2",       "Context-Dependent"
)

# --- Map 2: Broader Functional Category ---
role_map_functional <- tribble(
  ~Gene,          ~FunctionalCategory,
  "PLAGL2",       "Gene Regulation & TFs",
  "CUEDC1",       "Signaling & Proliferation",
  "KDM6B",        "Gene Regulation & TFs",
  "GATA6",        "Gene Regulation & TFs",
  "AFF1",         "Gene Regulation & TFs",
  "MAP2K6",       "Signaling & Proliferation",
  "ADRA2C",       "Signaling & Proliferation",
  "CTDSP2",       "Gene Regulation & TFs",
  "SBK1",         "Signaling & Proliferation",
  "FNDC3B",       "Cell Adhesion & ECM",
  "RINL",         "Signaling & Proliferation",
  "PAFAH1B3",     "Metabolism",
  "PPCS",         "Metabolism",
  "ILVBL",        "Metabolism",
  "GMDS",         "Metabolism",
  "MESDC2",       "Signaling & Proliferation",
  "UBASH3B",      "Immune Response",
  "CD5",          "Immune Response",
  "PPHLN1",       "Structural / Cytoskeletal",
  "MANEAL",       "Other Function",
  "PDCL3",        "Signaling & Proliferation",
  "KIAA0247",     "Other Function",
  "TMEM87B",      "Unknown / Intergenic",
  "OTX2-AS1",     "Gene Regulation & TFs",
  "IGSF21",       "Cell Adhesion & ECM",
  "FREM2",        "Cell Adhesion & ECM",
  "CACNA1C",      "Ion Transport",
  "KRT37",        "Structural / Cytoskeletal",
  "KRTAP2-1",     "Structural / Cytoskeletal",
  "MPZ",          "Cell Adhesion & ECM",
  "YPEL4",        "Signaling & Proliferation",
  "RFC3",         "Other Function",
  "LOC100506207", "Unknown / Intergenic",
  "SCAMP5",       "Other Function",
  "TECTB",        "Cell Adhesion & ECM",
  "LINC01210",    "Unknown / Intergenic",
  "MARCH4",       "Other Function",
  "FRMPD2",       "Cell Adhesion & ECM",
  "SLIT2",       "Signaling & Proliferation",
  "PTPRM",       "Cell Adhesion & ECM",
  "SOCS1",       "Immune Response",
  "TNXB",        "Cell Adhesion & ECM",
  "RASA3",       "Signaling & Proliferation",
  "TET1",        "Gene Regulation & TFs",
  "MCC",         "Signaling & Proliferation",
  "EPHB1",       "Signaling & Proliferation",
  "SOX14",       "Gene Regulation & TFs",
  "PVALB",       "Ion Transport",
  "ZNF382",      "Gene Regulation & TFs",
  "SIX3",        "Gene Regulation & TFs",
  "PITX2",       "Gene Regulation & TFs",
  "PAK1",        "Signaling & Proliferation",
  "ELOVL5",      "Metabolism",
  "INHBB",       "Signaling & Proliferation",
  "NRN1",        "Signaling & Proliferation",
  "STMN2",       "Structural / Cytoskeletal",
  "S1PR1",       "Signaling & Proliferation",
  "WNT1",        "Signaling & Proliferation",
  "PRMT6",       "Gene Regulation & TFs",
  "FGR",         "Signaling & Proliferation",
  "JMJD8",       "Other Function",
  "FAM126A",     "Signaling & Proliferation",
  "GPR1-AS",     "Gene Regulation & TFs",
  "ANK1",        "Other Function",
  "WNT5A",       "Signaling & Proliferation",
  "KLF7",        "Gene Regulation & TFs",
  "DTX1",        "Signaling & Proliferation",
  "GRK5",        "Signaling & Proliferation",
  "ZMYM2",       "Gene Regulation & TFs",
  "ABCA7",       "Metabolism",
  "CENPB",       "Other Function",
  "FNDC4",       "Signaling & Proliferation",
  "HLA-L",       "Immune Response",
  "HLA-DOA",     "Immune Response",
  "ALDH1A3",     "Metabolism",
  "NRP2",        "Signaling & Proliferation",
  "COL5A1",      "Cell Adhesion & ECM",
  "GRHL3",       "Gene Regulation & TFs",
  "SESN1",       "Signaling & Proliferation",
  "KREMEN2",     "Signaling & Proliferation",
  "EPHB6",       "Signaling & Proliferation",
  "MARK1",       "Structural / Cytoskeletal",
  "MAPK4",       "Signaling & Proliferation",
  "ABL1",        "Signaling & Proliferation",
  "KIF1A",       "Structural / Cytoskeletal",
  "ABR",         "Signaling & Proliferation",
  "ISM1",        "Signaling & Proliferation",
  "ADRA1D",      "Signaling & Proliferation",
  "ADAMTS19-AS1","Gene Regulation & TFs",
  "BAI3",        "Cell Adhesion & ECM",
  "BNC2",        "Gene Regulation & TFs",
  "CORO2B",      "Structural / Cytoskeletal",
  "CSMD2",       "Cell Adhesion & ECM",
  "FJX1",        "Signaling & Proliferation",
  "H2AFY2",      "Gene Regulation & TFs",
  "LHX4",        "Gene Regulation & TFs",
  "LMO2",        "Gene Regulation & TFs",
  "MACROD1",     "Other Function",
  "MIXL1",       "Gene Regulation & TFs",
  "NAV2",        "Structural / Cytoskeletal",
  "NEURL",       "Signaling & Proliferation",
  "NEUROG1",     "Gene Regulation & TFs",
  "NTF3",        "Signaling & Proliferation",
  "NXN",         "Metabolism",
  "RASGRP2",     "Signaling & Proliferation",
  "SHC4",        "Signaling & Proliferation",
  "STMN3",       "Structural / Cytoskeletal",
  "TACR1",       "Signaling & Proliferation",
  "TFAP2B",      "Gene Regulation & TFs",
  "TRPM1",       "Ion Transport",
  "ZDBF2",       "Gene Regulation & TFs",
  "CAPN13",      "Other Function",
  "CA10",        "Other Function",
  "LINC00424",   "Unknown / Intergenic",
  "GALNT14",     "Metabolism",
  "C10orf11",    "Immune Response",
  "CCDC60",      "Unknown / Intergenic",
  "LOC644145",   "Unknown / Intergenic",
  "C8orf33",     "Unknown / Intergenic",
  "KCNQ2",       "Ion Transport",
  "ATP7B",       "Ion Transport",
  "DSCR3",       "Unknown / Intergenic",
  "SNORA39",     "Unknown / Intergenic",
  "SPTBN4",      "Structural / Cytoskeletal",
  "LOC100190940","Unknown / Intergenic",
  "GOLT1A",      "Other Function",
  "BSN",         "Other Function",
  "FAM150B",     "Signaling & Proliferation",
  "FAM69B",      "Unknown / Intergenic",
  "LRRC14B",     "Unknown / Intergenic",
  "GALNT9",      "Metabolism",
  "SLC38A3",     "Metabolism",
  "NAT8L",       "Metabolism",
  "C12orf68",    "Unknown / Intergenic",
  "PRDM8",       "Gene Regulation & TFs",
  "GPR123",      "Signaling & Proliferation",
  "ZDHHC22",     "Metabolism",
  "C3orf50",     "Unknown / Intergenic",
  "C14orf39",    "Unknown / Intergenic",
  "SLC1A2",      "Metabolism",
  "TCHH",        "Structural / Cytoskeletal",
  "LINC01152",   "Unknown / Intergenic",
  "RGS7",        "Signaling & Proliferation",
  "FLJ44817",    "Unknown / Intergenic",
  "BRSK2",       "Signaling & Proliferation",
  "C1orf65",     "Unknown / Intergenic",
  "FAM163A",     "Unknown / Intergenic",
  "GABRB2",      "Signaling & Proliferation",
  "HTR4",        "Signaling & Proliferation",
  "CHST1",       "Metabolism",
  "ECE2",        "Other Function",
  "DPYSL4",      "Structural / Cytoskeletal",
  "CDYL",        "Gene Regulation & TFs",
  "SNCAIP",      "Other Function",
  "SLC30A3",     "Ion Transport",
  "LOC387763",   "Unknown / Intergenic",
  "SLC30A10",    "Ion Transport",
  "C3orf55",     "Unknown / Intergenic",
  "MLN",         "Signaling & Proliferation",
  "TMOD1",       "Structural / Cytoskeletal",
  "AP3B2",       "Other Function",
  "TFPT",        "Gene Regulation & TFs",
  "MIR548H4",    "Unknown / Intergenic",
  "BEND6",       "Unknown / Intergenic",
  "ZNF775",      "Gene Regulation & TFs",
  "STXBP5L",     "Other Function",
  "PRPH",        "Structural / Cytoskeletal",
  "LMF1",        "Metabolism",
  "SAMD11",      "Unknown / Intergenic",
  "MFSD2B",      "Metabolism",
  "CNIH2",       "Other Function",
  "CACNB4",      "Ion Transport",
  "WSCD1",       "Unknown / Intergenic",
  "CCDC42B",     "Unknown / Intergenic",
  "PRPF31",      "Other Function",
  "UQCC",        "Metabolism"
)


# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
# 4. Process Metadata and Filter Beta Matrix (Using in-memory beta_comb)
# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
msg("Processing metadata...")
meta <- read_csv(meta_csv, show_col_types = FALSE) %>%
  mutate(
    SampleID = paste(Sentrix_ID, Sentrix_Position, sep = "_"),
    mets_progression = case_when(
      Distant_Mets == 1 ~ "Distant",
      ln_only == 1      ~ "Lymph Node",
      TRUE              ~ "No Mets"
    ),
    mets_progression = factor(mets_progression,
                              levels = c("No Mets", "Lymph Node", "Distant"))
  ) %>% dplyr::select(SampleID, mets_progression)

common_samples <- intersect(colnames(beta_comb), meta$SampleID)
stopifnot(length(common_samples) > 0)
beta_use_unfiltered <- beta_comb[, common_samples, drop = FALSE]
meta_use <- filter(meta, SampleID %in% common_samples)
all_cpgs_union <- unique(unlist(lapply(cpg_lists, function(df) df$CpG_ID)))
cpgs_present_in_beta <- intersect(all_cpgs_union, rownames(beta_use_unfiltered))
beta_use <- beta_use_unfiltered[cpgs_present_in_beta, , drop = FALSE]

################################################################################
# Diagnostic: Trace CpG counts from list → beta matrix → final heatmap
################################################################################

msg("=== CpG Matching Diagnostics ===")

# 1️⃣  Basic dimensions
msg(glue("Total CpGs in beta_comb: {nrow(beta_comb)}"))
msg(glue("Total CpGs (Any): {nrow(cpg_list_any)}"))
msg(glue("Total CpGs (LN): {nrow(cpg_list_ln)}"))
msg(glue("Total CpGs (Dist): {nrow(cpg_list_dist)}"))

# 2️⃣  Match counts before subsetting
n_match_any  <- length(intersect(cpg_list_any$CpG_ID,  rownames(beta_comb)))
n_match_ln   <- length(intersect(cpg_list_ln$CpG_ID,   rownames(beta_comb)))
n_match_dist <- length(intersect(cpg_list_dist$CpG_ID, rownames(beta_comb)))

msg(glue("CpGs matched to beta_comb: Any={n_match_any}, LN={n_match_ln}, Dist={n_match_dist}"))

# 3️⃣  Spot-check a few missing ones for Distant
missing_dist <- setdiff(cpg_list_dist$CpG_ID, rownames(beta_comb))
if (length(missing_dist) > 0) {
  msg(glue("First 10 missing CpGs (Distant): {paste(head(missing_dist, 10), collapse = ', ')}"))
} else {
  msg("✅ All Distant CpGs matched to beta_comb.")
}

# 4️⃣  Confirm counts after creating beta_use
msg(glue("CpGs retained in beta_use after intersect: {nrow(beta_use)}"))

# 5️⃣  Optional: Check for formatting inconsistencies (trailing .1, spaces, etc.)
check_suffixes <- grep("\\.\\d+$", rownames(beta_comb), value = TRUE)
if (length(check_suffixes) > 0) {
  msg(glue("Note: {length(check_suffixes)} CpG IDs in beta_comb have numeric suffixes like '.1'."))
}

# 6️⃣  Quick normalization test (without modifying data yet)
test_norm_match <- length(intersect(
  gsub("\\.\\d+$", "", trimws(cpg_list_dist$CpG_ID)),
  gsub("\\.\\d+$", "", trimws(rownames(beta_comb)))
))
msg(glue("If suffixes/spaces are removed, matched CpGs (Distant) would be: {test_norm_match}"))

msg("=== End of CpG Diagnostics ===\n")
# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
# 5. Prepare Annotations, Sort Samples, Define Colors
# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
msg("Preparing annotations and sorting samples...")
annotation_col <- meta_use %>%
  dplyr::select(SampleID, mets_progression) %>%
  column_to_rownames("SampleID")

annotation_col <- annotation_col %>% arrange(mets_progression)
sorted_sample_names <- rownames(annotation_col)
beta_use_sorted <- beta_use[, sorted_sample_names, drop = FALSE]
stopifnot(identical(colnames(beta_use_sorted), rownames(annotation_col)))

pro_anti_colors <- c(
  "Pro-tumor"          = "#e41a1c", # Red
  "Anti-tumor"         = "#377eb8", # Blue
  "Leaning Anti-tumor" = "#4daf4a", # Green
  "Leaning Pro-tumor"  = "#ff7f00", # Orange/Light Red <-- ADDED THIS LINE
  "Context-Dependent"  = "#984ea3", # Purple
  "Uncertain"          = "grey50"   # Dark Grey
)
metastasis_colors <- c(
  "No Mets"    = "#fdbf6f",
  "Lymph Node" = "#1f78b4",
  "Distant"    = "#e31a1c"
)
all_functional_categories <- unique(c(role_map_functional$FunctionalCategory, "Unknown / Intergenic"))
if (length(all_functional_categories) <= 12) {
    functional_cat_colors_vec <- RColorBrewer::brewer.pal(max(3, length(all_functional_categories)), "Paired")
    functional_cat_colors_vec <- functional_cat_colors_vec[1:length(all_functional_categories)]
} else {
    functional_cat_colors_vec <- rainbow(length(all_functional_categories))
    warning("More than 12 functional categories; using rainbow palette.")
}
names(functional_cat_colors_vec) <- all_functional_categories
functional_cat_colors_vec["Unknown / Intergenic"] <- "grey80"

ann_colors <- list(
  ProAntiRole       = pro_anti_colors,
  FunctionalCategory = functional_cat_colors_vec,
  mets_progression   = metastasis_colors
)

col_fun <- colorRampPalette(rev(brewer.pal(11, "RdBu")))(101)
lims <- c(-2, 2)

# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
# 6. Loop Through Conditions and Generate COMBINED Heatmaps (Cairo, Adjusted Space, setdiff fixed)
# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
msg("Generating combined heatmaps with dual annotations using Cairo...")

zscore <- function(x) {
  s <- sd(x, na.rm = TRUE)
  if (is.na(s) || s == 0) return(rep(0, length(x)))
  (x - mean(x, na.rm = TRUE)) / s
}

extract_legend <- function(pheatmap_plot){
    legend_grob <- pheatmap_plot$gtable$grobs[[which(pheatmap_plot$gtable$layout$name == "legend")]]
    annot_legend_indices <- grep("annotation_legend", pheatmap_plot$gtable$layout$name)
    annot_legend_grobs <- pheatmap_plot$gtable$grobs[annot_legend_indices]
    # Combine legend grobs vertically
    full_legend <- gridExtra::arrangeGrob(grobs = c(list(legend_grob), annot_legend_grobs), ncol = 1)
    return(full_legend)
}

# Conversion factor (defined in Section 1)
# points_per_inch <- 72.27
# cell_size_points <- 10

for (cond_name in names(cpg_lists)) {
  msg(glue("\n--- Processing condition: {cond_name} ---"))

  current_cpg_df_raw <- cpg_lists[[cond_name]]

  # --- (Code to create current_cpg_df, joining maps, filtering by beta_use_sorted) ---
  current_cpg_df <- current_cpg_df_raw %>%
    left_join(role_map_pro_anti, by = "Gene") %>%
    left_join(role_map_functional, by = "Gene") %>%
    mutate(
      ProAntiRole = coalesce(ProAntiRole, "Uncertain"),
      FunctionalCategory = coalesce(FunctionalCategory, "Unknown / Intergenic")
    ) %>%
    filter(CpG_ID %in% rownames(beta_use_sorted))

  if(nrow(current_cpg_df) == 0) {
      msg(glue(" -> No CpGs remain for {cond_name}. Skipping heatmap."))
      next
  }

  # --- (Code to create annotation_row_df_combined) ---
  annotation_row_df_combined <- current_cpg_df %>%
    dplyr::select(CpG_ID, ProAntiRole, FunctionalCategory) %>%
    distinct() %>%
    column_to_rownames("CpG_ID")

  all_ids_current <- current_cpg_df$CpG_ID

  # --- (Code to check for missing CpGs and adjust all_ids_current/current_cpg_df if needed) ---
   missing_cpgs <- setdiff(all_ids_current, rownames(beta_use_sorted))
   if (length(missing_cpgs) > 0) {
       msg(glue("WARNING for {cond_name}: CpGs not found in beta_use_sorted: {paste(head(missing_cpgs, 5), collapse=', ')}..."))
       all_ids_current <- intersect(all_ids_current, rownames(beta_use_sorted))
       if (length(all_ids_current) == 0) {
           msg(glue(" -> No valid CpGs left for {cond_name}. Skipping."))
           next
        }
       current_cpg_df <- current_cpg_df %>% filter(CpG_ID %in% all_ids_current)
   }


  # --- (Code to create beta_sub_current, beta_z_current, all_labels, annotation_row_final) ---
  beta_sub_current <- beta_use_sorted[all_ids_current, , drop = FALSE]
  beta_z_current   <- t(apply(beta_sub_current, 1, zscore))
   if(is.vector(beta_z_current) && length(all_ids_current) == 1){ # Handle single row case
      beta_z_current <- matrix(beta_z_current, nrow=1, dimnames=list(rownames(beta_sub_current), names(beta_z_current)))
  } else if (nrow(beta_z_current) > 0) {
      rownames(beta_z_current) <- rownames(beta_sub_current)
  }
   if(nrow(beta_z_current) == 0){ # Check if z-scoring failed or produced empty matrix
       msg(glue(" -> No rows remaining after z-scoring for {cond_name}. Skipping heatmap."))
       next
  }
  all_labels <- paste0(current_cpg_df$Gene[match(all_ids_current, current_cpg_df$CpG_ID)], " (", all_ids_current, ")")
  all_labels[is.na(current_cpg_df$Gene[match(all_ids_current, current_cpg_df$CpG_ID)])] <- paste0("NA (", all_ids_current[is.na(current_cpg_df$Gene[match(all_ids_current, current_cpg_df$CpG_ID)])], ")")
  rownames(beta_z_current) <- all_labels

  # Ensure annotation_row_final uses only the CpGs that survived z-scoring etc.
  final_ids_for_annot <- rownames(beta_sub_current) # Use CpG IDs from before labelling
  annotation_row_final <- annotation_row_df_combined[final_ids_for_annot, , drop = FALSE]
  rownames(annotation_row_final) <- rownames(beta_z_current) # Match final labels

  # --- FIXED Verification checks ---
  mismatched_proanti <- setdiff(unique(annotation_row_final$ProAntiRole), names(ann_colors$ProAntiRole))
  if(length(mismatched_proanti) > 0) {
      stop(glue("FATAL ERROR in {cond_name}: Mismatch between ProAntiRole annotation levels and color key. Levels in data not in key: {paste(mismatched_proanti, collapse=', ')}"))
  }
  mismatched_func <- setdiff(unique(annotation_row_final$FunctionalCategory), names(ann_colors$FunctionalCategory))
   if(length(mismatched_func) > 0) {
       stop(glue("FATAL ERROR in {cond_name}: Mismatch between FunctionalCategory annotation levels and color key. Levels in data not in key: {paste(mismatched_func, collapse=', ')}"))
   }
   # --- End Fixed Checks ---


  cluster_r_current <- if (nrow(beta_z_current) >= 2) TRUE else FALSE

  msg(glue("Columns included in heatmap for '{cond_name}': {ncol(beta_z_current)} samples"))
  msg(glue("Rows included in heatmap for '{cond_name}': {nrow(beta_z_current)} CpGs"))

  # --- Generate pheatmap object ---
  heatmap_filename <- file.path(output_dir, glue("heatmap_{cond_name}_beta_combined_dual_annot.pdf"))
  tryCatch({ # Wrap pheatmap call in tryCatch
      p_heatmap_obj <- pheatmap(
          beta_z_current, color = col_fun, breaks = seq(lims[1], lims[2], length.out = 101),
          annotation_row = annotation_row_final, annotation_col = annotation_col,
          annotation_colors = ann_colors, cluster_rows = cluster_r_current, cluster_cols = FALSE,
          show_colnames = TRUE,
          fontsize_col = 5,
          fontsize_row = 7,
          border_color = NA,
          show_colnames = T,
          cellwidth = cell_size_points,
          cellheight = cell_size_points,
          main = glue("{cond_name} Mets: Top CpGs (Beta-values, z-scored)"),
          silent = TRUE, filename = NA
      )

      if (!is.null(p_heatmap_obj$gtable)) {
          # --- Calculate PDF dimensions ---
          width_buffer_inches <- 5
          height_buffer_inches <- 3
          heatmap_width_inches <- ncol(beta_z_current) * cell_size_points / points_per_inch
          heatmap_height_inches <- nrow(beta_z_current) * cell_size_points / points_per_inch
          pdf_width <- max(10, heatmap_width_inches + width_buffer_inches) # Use max(10,...) instead of max(12,...)
          pdf_height <- max(8, heatmap_height_inches + height_buffer_inches)

          # --- Save Heatmap ---
          cairo_pdf(heatmap_filename, width = pdf_width, height = pdf_height)
          grid::grid.newpage(); grid::grid.draw(p_heatmap_obj$gtable); dev.off()
          msg(glue(" -> Saved COMBINED heatmap ({cond_name}) using CairoPDF ({round(pdf_width,1)}x{round(pdf_height,1)} inches). Rows Plotted: {nrow(beta_z_current)}"))

          # --- Save Legend ---
          legend_filename <- file.path(output_dir, glue("heatmap_{cond_name}_LEGEND_only.pdf"))
          legend_grob <- extract_legend(p_heatmap_obj)
          if (!is.null(legend_grob) && inherits(legend_grob, "grob")) {
              cairo_pdf(legend_filename, width = 4, height = 12)
              grid::grid.newpage(); grid::grid.draw(legend_grob); dev.off()
              msg(glue(" -> Saved SEPARATE LEGEND file for {cond_name} using CairoPDF."))
          } else {
              msg(glue(" -> WARNING: Could not extract valid legend grob for {cond_name}."))
          }
      } else {
          msg(glue(" -> ERROR: pheatmap object gtable was NULL for {cond_name}. Heatmap/legend not saved."))
      }
  }, error = function(e){
       msg(glue(" -> ERROR during pheatmap plotting/saving for {cond_name}: {e$message}"))
  }) # End tryCatch

} # End loop

msg(glue("\n✅ Finished. Files saved to: {output_dir}"))
```
